title: DOJ Indicts Raúl Castro, Former Cuban Leader
summary: The U.S. Department of Justice has indicted Raúl Castro, Cuba's former leader, escalating tensions between the two nations.
charlotte_impact: This indictment could further strain US-Cuba relations and impact regional stability.

title: Jan. 6 Police Officers Sue to Block Trump’s ‘Anti-Weaponization Fund’
summary: Police officers involved in the Jan. 6 Capitol attack are suing to block Trump's fund, alleging it hinders justice.
charlotte_impact: This lawsuit adds another layer to the legal challenges surrounding the Jan. 6 events.

title: Trump’s $1.8 Billion Fund Tests Constitutional Limits
summary: Trump's substantial fund is facing scrutiny regarding its constitutional legality and potential influence.

title: Security Guard Hailed as Hero in San Diego Mosque Attack

title: Republicans Acknowledge Trump's Limited Midterm Influence

title: DOJ Charges Ex-Prosecutor with Stealing Trump Documents Case Report
